_comment: TEMPLATE (Pass-2 / enriched form). Built in TWO passes: Pass 1 = narrative only (type, duration, scene_type, motion, texts, narration_segment) for your review; Pass 2 = add image_prompt + animation_prompt + file paths AFTER the story is approved. Scene 1 below shows the image_prompt field. See pipeline_automation.md → Storyboard JSON Schema for which field belongs to which pass. 'animated' scenes need animated_clip; 'static' scenes use Ken Burns via 'motion'.

scenes.image_prompt: [STYLE CARD] Isometric flat-design technical illustration of a Roman aqueduct (Pont du Gard) spanning a valley, wide establishing view, three tiers of arches, warm golden-hour light, muted earth tones with terracotta (#B85C38) highlights, warm parchment background, no text, no people.
scenes.animation_prompt: subtle parallax, clouds drifting slowly, water visible in the channel at top

texts.text: Pont du Gard — 50 km of gravity-fed flow

scenes.narration_segment: For a boy hauling water up the hill each dawn, the arches rising across the valley must have looked like the work of gods. They were not.
The real problem was never lifting the stone. It was carrying water downhill so gently it barely knew it was moving.

scenes.animation_prompt: water gently flowing right-to-left through the channel, subtle ripples
subtle parallax depth, tiny birds drifting in the background
